note: Implemented parse_peer_sections() in config.rs. Parses [Peer] sections from token stream into Vec<WgPeerConfig>. Maps PublicKey/PresharedKey via base64 decode to [u8;32], Endpoint to SocketAddr, AllowedIPs to Vec<IpNet> (comma-separated), PersistentKeepalive to Option<u16>. Supports multiple [Peer] sections. Returns ConfigError::ParseError for unrecognized keys or malformed values, MissingField for missing PublicKey. Added 13 tests covering: minimal/full peer, multiple peers, no peers, missing PublicKey, invalid endpoint/AllowedIPs/PresharedKey/keepalive, unrecognized key, comments/blanks, IPv6 endpoint, empty tokens. All 78 tests pass.
